name: Wrexham
metaTitle: Solar Panels Wrexham | Free Solar Quotes for North Wales Homes
metaDescription: Thinking about solar panels in Wrexham? Get a free, no-obligation solar quote and find out how much you could cut from your electricity bills. Serving Wrexham and nearby North Wales areas.
heroEyebrow: Solar for Wrexham & North Wales homes
heroHeadline: Lower your electricity bills with solar panels built for your roof
heroSub: Electricity prices aren't getting any friendlier. A well-sized solar panel system lets you generate your own power during the day and rely less on the grid — while adding a valuable upgrade to your home.

faqs.q: How much do solar panels cost in Wrexham?
faqs.a: Costs vary depending on your roof size, system type and whether you add battery storage. A local installer covering Wrexham will give you an accurate, no-obligation price once they understand your property.

faqs.q: Do I need planning permission for solar panels in Wrexham?
faqs.a: Most home solar installations in Wrexham fall under permitted development rights, but this can depend on your property type and whether it's listed or in a conservation area. Your installer can confirm what applies to your home.

faqs.q: How long does a solar panel installation take?
faqs.a: A typical domestic installation takes one to two days once scheduled, though timelines can vary based on system size and roof access.
